name: readiness_ask_then_proceed
notes: Journey COMPLETE with __flow__='ready_asked' (the readiness ask was just sent, journey.py _FLOW_READY_ASKED). An unambiguous affirm token ('haan'/'chalo' are in the deterministic _FLOW_AFFIRM floor set) short-circuits to _flow_offer_next_integration WITHOUT hitting the deferred/decline path. Setup: `setup --onboarded --flow ready_asked` then `script <tenant> readiness_ask_then_proceed.json`.

steps.message: Haan chalo, connect kar dete hain
steps.note: Unambiguous affirm to the readiness ask. Expect the flow to proceed toward connecting a data source (offer the easiest integration), NEVER the defer/hold-off message.

steps.message: ye ab turant ho jayega ya mujhe kuch karna padega
steps.note: Owner asks what happens next / what they need to do. Expect a substantive answer that keeps the connect flow moving, not a stall.
